examples: We gave them a drubbing in the match on Saturday.
Inspired by 80,000 awed fans, the nimble, stocky striker scored four against the Soviets, who could only add a meaningless consolation goal in a 4-1 drubbing.
The 51-year-old Mr Soru might have been ideal, had he not suffered such a drubbing.
Gartner and IDC alike agree that Acer, Dell and HP all took a drubbing.
Might the incumbency advantage save the Tories from the expected drubbing on May 1st?
